entity.label: East Gate
entity.subtitle: Landmark
entity.description: (Jer. 19:2), properly the Potter’s gate, the gate which led to the potter’s field, in the valley of Hinnom.

nodes.label: East Gate
nodes.description: (Jer. 19:2), properly the Potter’s gate, the gate which led to the potter’s field, in the valley of Hinnom.

verses.text: And go forth unto the valley of the son of Hinnom, which is by the entry of the east gate, and proclaim there the words that I shall tell thee,
